title: dichanthelium koolauense
intro: Dichanthelium koolauense, also known as Ko'olau hair grass or Ko'olau bent grass, is a species of grass native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Hawaiian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dichanthelium koolauense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, although I couldn't verify any commercial or widely accepted uses.
